name: kunal-singh-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin collection by Kunal Singh

plugins.name: tmux-capture
plugins.description: Capture tmux pane output to ~/tmux-logs/ so a Claude Code session can read and analyze output from another pane. Useful for debugging when one pane runs an app and another runs Claude.

plugins.name: pluginify
plugins.description: AI-powered Claude Code plugin generator. Converts natural language descriptions into production-ready, validated plugin structures.

plugins.name: context-manager
plugins.description: Interactively toggle plugins and MCP servers per project session to manage context window usage. Writes plugin state to .claude/settings.local.json and MCP state to ~/.claude.json without modifying source config.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Team session scaffolding — creates structured PRD, architecture, and review checklist files in .claude/team-sessions/ with a searchable JSON index. Sessions are listed by date and searchable by name, with AI summarisation on demand.

plugins.name: product-manager
plugins.description: Product manager agent — interviews users to populate session PRDs and answers inter-agent review questions.
